abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is confused, it has twice its evasion.

abilities.shortEffect: Nullifies effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil.
abilities.effect: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during hail.  Protects against hail damage.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during hail, and it does not take hail damage regardless of type.
